summary: The Canyon withdrawals validation divergence is a semicolon-only rustfmt change in the non-empty withdrawals error return; no validation behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 213: M	crates/optimism/consensus/src/validation/canyon.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Err(OpConsensusError::WithdrawalsNonEmpty)` to `return Err(OpConsensusError::WithdrawalsNonEmpty);`.
No withdrawal presence checks, Canyon rule behavior, or error type changed.
